---
title: "Danvers Papers: An Invention, The By the author of  “The Heir of Redclyffe.”"
---

## Danvers Papers: An Invention, The By the author of  “The Heir of Redclyffe.”

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1867.
**Genre:** Fiction (historical)
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** London: Macmillan and Co.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
